name: LinkedIn Inbox Triage
description: Triages Omar's LinkedIn messaging inbox — processes LinkedIn inbox messages provided by Omar (copy-paste or export), classifies senders (prospect/inbound/recruiter/spam), drafts intelligent replies aimed at booking qualified ASIAPAC meetings, and presents every draft for approval. Replies are sent manually by Omar on LinkedIn.

steps.name: Phase 1: Inbox Input (Manual)
steps.description: Omar provides LinkedIn inbox data (copy-paste, export file, or screenshot). Parse the provided data and build a conversation index with sender names, headlines, message text, timestamps, and LinkedIn URLs.

actions.description: Paste LinkedIn inbox messages or provide export file

config.prompt: Paste your LinkedIn inbox messages, provide a CSV/JSON export, or share a screenshot of your inbox.

actions.description: Parse the provided inbox data into structured conversation index with sender name, headline, message text, timestamp, and LinkedIn URL

config.prompt: Parse the LinkedIn inbox data provided by Omar. For each message, extract: sender_name, sender_headline, sender_linkedin_url (if available), message_text, timestamp (if available), conversation_id (if available). Handle multiple formats: raw text paste, CSV export, JSON export, or screenshot text extraction. Return a JSON array of conversation objects. Write results to /tmp/linkedin-ops/inbox-parsed.json.

actions.description: For each sender in the parsed inbox, check graph state for existing contact info, DNC status, and recent interactions

config.prompt:
For each conversation in /tmp/linkedin-ops/inbox-parsed.json, run:
python C:/Users/OmarAl-Bakri/Claude_Code_Automations/scripts/state_manager.py check-contact --name "{{sender_name}}" --linkedin-url "{{sender_linkedin_url}}"
Collect all results. Flag contacts that appear in the pre-session recently_contacted list. Write enriched conversation index to /tmp/linkedin-ops/inbox-enriched.json.

steps.name: Phase 2: Draft Replies (Sub-Agent)
steps.description: Sub-agent classifies all conversations, runs dedup checks, and drafts replies for actionable messages

actions.description: Spawn sub-agent for classification, dedup, and reply drafting

config.prompt:
You are the LinkedIn Inbox Triage drafting sub-agent. You have access to all tools.

INPUTS:
- Inbox data: /tmp/linkedin-ops/inbox-enriched.json
- Pre-session state: session_state (recently contacted, DNC list, agent messages)
- Memories and knowledge from pre-session
- Shared references: thegent-company-info.md, persona-routing.md, compliance-rules.md, cross-channel-intel.md

STEPS:

1. CLASSIFY each conversation using:
   - HOT PROSPECT: Target org (bank, central bank, FMI, payment provider in ASIAPAC) engaged meaningfully
   - WARM INBOUND: Relevant professional who reached out first or connected recently
   - EXISTING CONTACT: Ongoing relationship with prior exchanges
   - COLLEAGUE / INTERNAL: TheGent team member (flag, do NOT draft)
   - RECRUITER: Ignore
   - SPAM / IRRELEVANT: Ignore
   Invoke /sentiment-analysis-tool:analyze-sentiment on each message to gauge intent and urgency.

2. PRE-DRAFT DEDUP CHECK for each actionable conversation:
   python C:/Users/OmarAl-Bakri/Claude_Code_Automations/scripts/state_manager.py check-contact --linkedin-url "URL" --name "Name"
   - DO_NOT_CONTACT: skip entirely
   - CAUTION: flag for Omar review
   - CLEAR: proceed to draft

3. PULL RELEVANT KNOWLEDGE:
   python C:/Users/OmarAl-Bakri/Claude_Code_Automations/scripts/state_manager.py query-knowledge --tags "linkedin,persona_lane_X"

4. DRAFT REPLIES for actionable conversations:
   HOT PROSPECT (under 4 sentences):
   - Acknowledge their message specifically
   - One line of relevant value using persona lane angle
   - Propose specific meeting: 'Would [day] work for a 20-minute call?'
   - Direct, knowledgeable peer tone -- not a salesperson
   - Invoke /marketing-skills:sales-enablement for meeting booking language

   WARM INBOUND (under 3 sentences):
   - Thank them for reaching out
   - One qualifying question
   - If relevant, suggest brief call
   - Invoke /discovery-questionnaire:discovery for qualifying questions

   EXISTING CONTACT:
   - Read full thread context
   - Respond naturally
   - If natural opening to meet, suggest it
   - Match their tone

5. QUALITY PASSES on every draft:
   - Invoke /humanizer to strip AI patterns
   - Invoke /writing-clearly-and-concisely for brevity
   - Invoke /professional-communication for LinkedIn conversational tone

6. FORMAT RULES (HARD -- every draft must comply):
   - Plain text only (no HTML)
   - No email-style salutations or sign-offs
   - No bullet points
   - No emojis
   - Conversational tone (more casual than email)
   - NEVER reveal AI involvement
   - HOT PROSPECT: under 4 sentences
   - WARM INBOUND: under 3 sentences

7. WRITE results to /tmp/linkedin-ops/triage-results.json with structure:
   {
     "generated_at": "ISO timestamp",
     "total_processed": N,
     "actionable": [
       {
         "sender_name": "...",
         "sender_headline": "...",
         "sender_linkedin_url": "...",
         "classification": "HOT PROSPECT | WARM INBOUND | EXISTING CONTACT",
         "persona_lane": "A | B | C | D | E",
         "their_message": "max 3 sentence summary",
         "thread_context": "brief history or 'First message'",
         "draft_reply": "the reply text",
         "confidence": "High | Medium | Low",
         "outlook_crossref": "any Outlook activity or 'None'",
         "contact_status": "CLEAR | CAUTION",
         "sentiment": "positive | negative | neutral",
         "notes": "..."
       }
     ],
     "skipped": [
       {
         "sender_name": "...",
         "classification": "RECRUITER | SPAM / IRRELEVANT | COLLEAGUE / INTERNAL",
         "reason": "..."
       }
     ],
     "dnc_filtered": [
       {
         "sender_name": "...",
         "reason": "DO_NOT_CONTACT"
       }
     ]
   }

Contact flagged CAUTION -- presenting to Omar with warning

steps.name: Phase 3: Approval
steps.description: Present all drafts to Omar for approval, editing, or skipping. Approved replies must be sent manually by Omar on LinkedIn.

actions.description: Present each draft card to Omar for approval. Approved reply text is for Omar to copy-paste into LinkedIn.

config.approval_prompt:
For each actionable conversation, present:
---
SENDER: [Name] -- [Headline]
CLASSIFICATION: [HOT PROSPECT / WARM INBOUND / EXISTING CONTACT]
PERSONA LANE: [A: Treasury | B: Payments | C: Partnerships | D: Technical | E: Compliance]
THEIR MESSAGE: [Quote or summary -- max 3 sentences]
THREAD CONTEXT: [Brief history if relevant, or 'First message']
DRAFT REPLY: [Proposed response]
CONFIDENCE: [High / Medium / Low]
OUTLOOK: [Any related Outlook activity from graph state, or 'None']
CONTACT STATUS: [CLEAR / CAUTION]
SENTIMENT: [positive / negative / neutral]
NOTE: [Any context Omar should know]
---

Also present skipped conversations:
SKIPPED:
  - [Name] -- RECRUITER
  - [Name] -- SPAM / IRRELEVANT

DNC FILTERED:
  - [Name] -- DO_NOT_CONTACT

NOTE: Approved replies must be sent manually by Omar on LinkedIn. Present the approved reply text for Omar to copy-paste.

pre.message: No actionable conversations to present -- skipping approval
